title: Spicy Mediterranean Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir fry with chicken, bell peppers, and Mediterranean spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the peppery sauce, oregano, and garlic to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
